recent_calls.summary: Patricia called to schedule her routine spring air conditioning cleaning and selected the earliest available slot on Wednesday, June 4th, from 4 to 6 PM. The agent provisionally booked the appointment and clarified the service details. When Patricia mentioned she had already paid for the package and expected no charge, the agent transferred her to the billing team for further assistance.

Patrick Wadlow called to schedule a standard repair for his upstairs air conditioning unit at his home in O'Fallon, Missouri. The agent confirmed his details and available appointment slots, and Patrick selected Friday, June 5th at 2 PM. When Patrick asked about the initial charge, the agent transferred the call to the billing team for further assistance.
The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting. There was no conversation or task completed during the call.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to inquire about the technician's expected arrival time at 3910 Cordon Drive. The agent confirmed the appointment details and assured the user that the technician would call before arriving due to the unreliable doorbell. The call concluded with no further requests from the user.
The user called back after a missed call from Budget. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The user called and requested to speak with someone at the center. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The agent greeted the user and asked for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up shortly after without responding.

The agent attempted to engage the user by asking for their service address ZIP code, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after. No further information or assistance was provided during the call.
The user called to inquire about a missed appointment scheduled between nine and eleven. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The agent, Sophie, initiated the call to Chris, but the user responded that the agent had called them. The call ended shortly after without further conversation.
The user called to confirm if someone was coming to their place around noon for an appointment. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to inquire about their technician's arrival and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 17 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to find out the arrival time and location of Cole but was unable to get the address to work on their navigation system. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

Ted from American Home Shield called to schedule a heating and cooling service appointment for Anthony McBee, a home owner, with a forced air system not working. The agent confirmed the service details, updated the service address and contact information, and noted the request for the earliest available appointment. Ted declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call.

The user called to report an emergency AC work order at 2018 Greenbrier Drive, Collinsville, Illinois. The agent collected the service address, phone number, and user's name but the user requested to speak to customer service, so the call was transferred to a live agent. The transfer was successful.

The user called to schedule a cooling service appointment through American Home Shield because their cooling system was not working. The agent confirmed the details, including the user's role as the owner and the preferred appointment day, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them soon. The user also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call.

The user, Renitra, scheduled an HVAC service appointment for their home warranty through American Home Shield. The appointment was provisionally booked for Friday, June 5, 2026, from 10 AM to 12 PM, and the user confirmed all details as correct. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback and a polite closing from the agent.
The user requested to speak with Danielle, and the agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent named Danielle. The call was successfully transferred to another number for further assistance.

The user, Joshua Bodie, called to get an update on a service request. The agent was unable to find the appointment in the system and offered to transfer the user to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.

Paul Wabbe called to confirm the arrival time of a scheduled technician appointment. The agent could not find the appointment in the system and offered to leave a message or transfer to a live representative. Paul requested a live transfer, and the call was successfully transferred.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user inquired about sump pump servicing and cover replacement costs and requested a call back with pricing information before scheduling service. The agent confirmed the user's details and arranged for a call today to discuss the inspection and pricing. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user requested to be connected with Dan Lagarse, and the agent successfully transferred the call to the appropriate contact. The call lasted 18 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
The user called Budget and requested to speak with a representative who had previously contacted them. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.

The user, Jaunice, called to report an issue with their ICU unit not working and expressed the need for it to be fixed. The agent attempted to clarify if it was an emergency and offered to schedule a service appointment. The call ended with the user being transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to confirm an appointment but the agent could not find it in the system. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative for further assistance, and the call was successfully transferred.

Renee from American Home Shield called to discuss a work order that required a second opinion, which matched the original diagnosis, so the work order is being sent back to Budget to complete the job. The agent assured Renee that the team would be informed and would reach out to the customer directly. The call ended with the user thanking the agent and confirming the follow-up process.

Carlotta called to follow up on an urgent AC repair request due to health reasons. The agent confirmed the details, scheduled a technician visit for later that day, and offered information about maintenance programs, which Carlotta declined. The call ended with the agent assuring follow-up and Carlotta declining to provide feedback.

The user, Barbara Holiday, called to get assistance with filling out a service request due to difficulty understanding the questions because of her age and handicap. The agent acknowledged her situation and transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The call was very brief with the agent greeting the user and no further conversation occurring before the user hung up.

The user, Jean Murray, called to schedule a service appointment but no appointment was found in the system. The agent confirmed the user's contact information and offered to add a home phone number. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative for further assistance, and the call was successfully transferred.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another agent successfully. The call lasted 17 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to check the status of a work order. The agent confirmed the user's name and phone number, but was unable to find an appointment under the provided information. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call.
The user was unable to speak to a representative, so the agent attempted to transfer the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred to another number.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another agent successfully. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

Diego called to request a replacement for a leaking outdoor spigot. The agent scheduled a service appointment for Thursday, June 4th at 8 AM, and Diego confirmed the booking. Diego was satisfied with the interaction and provided positive feedback.

The user called to schedule a standard air conditioner cleaning and tune-up after having heating serviced previously. The agent provided available time slots, and the user initially selected Thursday at noon but then indicated a preference for Friday due to a scheduling conflict. The call ended with the user needing to check available times for Friday.

The user called to inquire about the exact time of an appointment scheduled for that morning. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user called Budget and asked to speak to a live person. The agent confirmed Budget's hours and then transferred the call to a live agent as requested.
The user called to follow up on a message they sent previously, but the agent was unable to assist and transferred the call to another number for further help.

The user called and provided their ZIP code 63108, then requested to speak with someone at a specific location. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to follow up on the status of a request and attempted to speak with a representative by pressing 0. The call ended shortly after without further resolution.
The user called to inquire about the opening hours. The agent provided the information that the office opens at 8 AM on weekdays, 9 AM on Saturdays, and is closed on Sundays.

The user called Budget's after-hours assistant but did not provide a valid ZIP code for service. The agent repeatedly asked for a valid five-digit ZIP code, but the user only pressed zero, which is invalid. The call ended shortly after without further information.

The user called after hours requesting a service summary from a recent appointment. The agent informed the user that detailed records are not accessible after hours but assured that the team will follow up with the service summary on the next business day. The call ended politely with no further requests from the user.

The user called to cancel an upcoming appointment but was informed that cancellations cannot be processed after hours. The agent assured the user that the request would be forwarded to the team for follow-up on the next business day. The user did not request any further assistance and ended the call politely.

The user called to report that Richard and Cole had promised a callback by the end of the day but it had not been received. The agent assured the user that the message would be passed along to the team for follow-up on the next business day. The user confirmed no additional details were needed.
